case_title: HELEN C TROOSH et al VS. CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY TROOSH, HELEN C DBA BIG TIME VENDING SIMMONS, MELVIN B DBA BIGH TIME VENDING AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-08-2008 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TROOSH, HELEN C DBA BIG TIME VENDING SIMMONS, MELVIN B DBA BIGH TIME VENDING
